title: AI Tintype Portrait
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a 19th-century tintype portrait. Preserve recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, pose, camera angle, and framing. Use monochrome silver-gray toning, shallow antique lens softness, metal-plate texture, subtle scratches, formal historical portrait lighting, and restrained vintage styling while keeping the subject identifiable.
negative_prompt: color, text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, different age, extra people, distorted face, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, modern glossy look, heavy blur, low quality, cartoon, illustration
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. antique metal plate portrait, formal studio pose...
